title: agastache scrophulariifolia var. mollis
intro: Agastache scrophulariifolia var. mollis, also known as Velvet-Hyssop, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its velvety leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Velvet-Hyssop include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate allergies, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Agastache scrophulariifolia var. mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
